aboutSubtitle.1: We take your products to new markets

aboutParagraph1.1: Terranova Sales is an established firm based in Vancouver BC, Canada, with more than 20 years performing as manufacturers' representative, sales consultant and broker.

aboutParagraph2.1: We work with manufacturers from Canada and Mexico. Our experience spans retail, foodservice, wholesale, and manufacturing sectors, where we have successfully represented products, managed key accounts, and facilitated cross-border business development.

productsSubtitle.1: This photo album is a recollection of some of the products and industries we have experience in. Click on a photo to enlarge and expand gallery.

servicesNeed3.1: Market entry strategies for Canada and Mexico

servicesAvailability.1: We work with a limited number of business development projects.

servicesApproach.1: Our approach is simple: understand the market, build relationships, create opportunities, and deliver results.

servicesCardSubtitle1.1: Identifying and directly contacting potential buyers.

servicesCardSubtitle2.1: We act as an extension of your sales team.

contactSubtitle.1: If your company could use support with sales development, market expansion, we’d be happy to have a conversation.
